linkedinPost:
no cap, our dev team said "let's make our CMS absolutely unhinged" and honestly? we're living for it 💀

y'all remember when finding Easter eggs in apps was peak entertainment? well we brought that energy back to HAXcms and it's giving main character vibes ✨

**easter eggs that are absolutely sending me rn:**

🔥 RICKROLL - opens the classic video but when you close it, keeps playing invisibly (chaotic evil energy)
🔥 NYANCAT - literally 50 rainbow cats flying across your screen at once (serotonin activated)
🔥 JOKER - screen gets invaded by 150+ joker and fire emojis while cursed audio plays (we really said chaos is a feature)
🔥 DARKWEB - full Matrix falling code effect that makes you feel like you're in a 2000s hacker movie
🔥 ETERNALDARKNESS - your sanity meter drops based on mouse position and triggers random horror game effects (this one hits different)

the way our devs really said "what if we made professional software but also completely feral" and honestly? that's the vibe we're going for

these aren't just cute Easter eggs, they're full production-quality chaos experiences built into our open source CMS 

drop your fave unhinged software features below! bonus points if they're absolutely unnecessary but amazing ✨

#TechTok #EasterEggs #HAXcms #DevLife #ChaoticGood #OpenSource

linkedinPost:
🎮 Remember when finding Easter eggs in software felt like discovering hidden treasure?

Those of us who grew up with Clippy winking at us in Word '97 know the joy of stumbling upon developer secrets. Our HAXcms editor brings back that nostalgic magic with actual cheat codes that would make the Konami Code proud!

**Top 5 HAXcms Easter Eggs That'll Make You Smile:**

1️⃣ **CLIPPY** - Yes, we brought back Microsoft's beloved assistant! Complete with helpful tips and that classic paper clip charm 📎

2️⃣ **WINDOWS95** - Transform your interface into a fully functional Windows 95 desktop with working Start menu, taskbar, and even Solitaire! 💻

3️⃣ **FURBY** - Late 90s nostalgia overload! Spawns trading card-style Furby popups that multiply when you try to close them (just like the real thing) 👾

4️⃣ **GEOCITIES** - Gives your page that classic "Under Construction" aesthetic complete with rainbow backgrounds and dancing GIFs 🌈

5️⃣ **TIMETRAVEL** - Adds sepia filter to the entire interface, making everything look like it's from the early days of computing ⏳

Just like finding that dancing baby screensaver or discovering the flight simulator hidden in Excel '97, these Easter eggs remind us that behind every program are developers who understand technology should spark joy, not just productivity.

What's your favorite software Easter egg from back in the day? Drop it in the comments! 

#TechNostalgia #EasterEggs #SoftwareDevelopment #HAXcms #OpenSource
